By the heaven, and the night-visitor,
what do you know what the night-visitor is?
There is no living being but there is a protector over it.Footnote-1
So let man consider of what he was created.Footnote-2
He was created of a gushing fluid,
emanating from between the loins and the ribs.Footnote-3
Surely He (the Creator) has the power to bring him back (to life).Footnote-4
On the Day when man's deepest secrets shall be put to the testFootnote-5
he shall have no power, and no helper.
By the heaven with its recurring cycle of rain,Footnote-6
and by the earth ever bursting with verdure,
this (Qur'an) is surely a decisive Word,
and I too am devising a guile.Footnote-9
So leave the unbelievers to themselves; respite them awhile.Footnote-10
